reg_desc: Register as a voter and verify your identity to continue
citizen_confirm: I confirm I am a legally recognized Ethiopian citizen.
consent_text: I consent to the secure cryptographic hashing of my biometric data for election integrity.
reg_success_desc: Your voter record has been created. Continue to the voter hub or sign in to proceed.
registration_closed_desc: Registration is closed. The election is currently in the {{phase}} phase, so voters should use their unique voting ID to cast a ballot.
reg_not_active_desc: Voter registration is not currently active. The election is in the {{phase}} phase.
unauthorized_reg: Unauthorized: your role does not have registration permissions.
manual_entry_restricted: Manual entry is restricted for election integrity. Please use your biometric-linked National ID.
security_notice_3: Duplicate detection runs against 50M+ node cluster.
nid_desc: Enter your National ID to auto-fill your registration from the national database.
inst_1: Ensure you are in a private environment.
inst_2: Your biometric signature is required to unlock the ballot.
inst_3: Once cast, your vote is anonymized via Mix-nets.
reg_open_voting_closed: Voter registration is open. Voting is currently closed.
voting_open: Voting is active. Cast your ballot now.
verified_citizen_desc: Authenticated as a verified citizen of Ethiopia. Your information is protected by end-to-end encryption.
privacy_protocol_desc: The NEHS uses Mix-nets technology. This means your identity and your vote are decoupled before reaching the tallying station. No administrator can link your ballot to your profile.
real_time_verify_desc: You can use your Receipt Hash to verify your ballot's inclusion in the public ledger up to 30 days after the election is certified.
ballot_voted_desc: Your digital ballot has been successfully cryptographically shuffled and recorded on the national ledger. Thank you for your participation.
voting_booth_inactive_desc: The voting booth is not currently active. The election is in the {{phase}} phase.
admin_only_desc: The administrative dashboard is reserved for authorized election officials. As a voter, you can only access your personal Voter Hub.
step_1_desc: Please look directly at the camera to verify your identity.
step_2_desc: Choose one representative for the National Assembly.
step_3_desc: Verify your selection before anchoring to the ledger.
privacy_notice_short: Your vote is anonymous and cryptographically secured
c1_bio: Abiy Ahmed is the current Prime Minister of Ethiopia and the chairman of the Prosperity Party. He received the 2019 Nobel Peace Prize.
c1_manifesto: Focusing on national unity, economic reform, and the 'Medemer' philosophy.
c1_platform: Green legacy, infrastructure development, and digital Ethiopia.
c2_bio: Jawar Mohammed is a prominent political activist and the former director of the Oromia Media Network. He is a key figure in the Oromo Federalist Congress.
c2_manifesto: Advocating for true federalism and the self-determination of the Oromo people.
c2_platform: Reform of the federal structure, social justice, and linguistic rights.
c3_bio: Berhanu Nega is a professor of economics and the leader of the Ethiopian Citizens for Social Justice (EZEMA). He was formerly the mayor-elect of Addis Ababa.
c3_manifesto: Establishing a system of social justice and ensuring the rule of law for all Ethiopian citizens.
c3_platform: Academic freedom, economic justice, and institutional integrity.
c4_bio: A grassroots movement representing the voices of Ethiopia's youth and their desire for change and participation in the political process.
c4_manifesto: Empowering the youth through education, employment, and political representation.
c4_platform: Job creation, digital transformation, and transparency in governance.
confirm_finalize: CRITICAL ACTION: This will immediately close all polling stations and finalize results. Proceed?
phase_control_desc: Manage election lifecycle and phase transitions.
integrity_engine_desc: Blockchain-anchored audit trail. Every action is cryptographically signed and immutably recorded.
regional_admin_desc: Integrated regional dashboard for oversight of voter registration integrity, station performance, and district synchronization protocols.
district_admin_desc: Localized precinct terminal for real-time voter flow management, staff coordination, and cryptographic ballot verification.
voter_registry_desc: Official list of verified electors for current cycle
search_placeholder: Search by Name or National ID...
no_voters_found: No voters found matching your search.
account_locked: Account locked. Too many failed attempts.
vote_success_desc: Thank you for voting. Your choice has been encrypted, added to a batch for mixing, and securely recorded without linking to your identity.
user_admin_desc: Manage authorized personnel and their system access levels
confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
voter_help_intro: Everything a voter needs to sign in, vote, and verify a ballot.
voter_help_tip_body: Stay on the voter hub for live election status, ballot access, and receipt verification.
voter_help_note_1: Keep your receipt code private until you verify your ballot.
voter_help_note_2: Use the voter hub to review election updates and current phase.
voter_help_note_3: If voting is closed, return when the election opens again.
voter_help_q1: How do I sign in as a voter?
voter_help_q2: What do I do after I enter the voter hub?
voter_help_q3: How do I cast my vote?
voter_help_q4: How do I verify my voting receipt?
voter_help_q5: What should I do if I need help?
voter_help_step_1_body: Use your voter account and complete biometric verification if requested.
voter_help_step_2_body: Read the election status and candidate information before you vote.
voter_help_step_3_body: Select your choice, submit your ballot, and keep your receipt code for verification.
historical_records: Historical data of Ethiopian democratic records
historical_records_desc: Historical data of Ethiopian democratic records
historical_verifiability_desc: All historical election data is cryptographically signed and available for public audit
faq_a1: The National Election Hub System (NEHS) is Ethiopia's state-of-the-art electronic voting platform designed to ensure transparent, secure, and accessible democratic participation.
faq_q2: How does the biometric verification work?
faq_a2: We use SHA-256 cryptographic hashing to turn your physical fingerprint or facial features into a unique digital string. Your actual biometric image is never stored, ensuring your privacy is protected even in the event of a breach.
faq_a3: Yes. NEHS uses a multi-layered encryption protocol (Mix-nets). Your vote is decoupled from your identity using cryptographic shuffling before it is added to the public ledger, making it mathematically impossible to link a specific ballot back to a voter.
faq_a4: After voting, you receive a unique transaction hash. This hash allows you to independently verify that your ballot was included in the final tally without revealing who you voted for.
faq_q5: How can I register to vote?
faq_a5: You can start the pre-registration process online by visiting the registration portal. You'll then need to visit a local election center once to capture your biometric data for identity verification.
data_at_rest_desc: All identity data is encrypted using military-grade AES-256 standards with rotating master keys.
in_flight_verifiability_desc: Uses End-to-End Verifiable (E2E-V) cryptography to ensure votes are recorded as cast and counted as recorded.
support_desc: If you are experiencing technical difficulties at a polling station, please contact your local Election Officer or call our 24/7 hotline.
unauthorized_access_prohibited: UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS IS STRICTLY PROHIBITED • SECURED BY CRYPTOGRAPHIC HASH CHAINING
results_live_desc: Cryptographically verified results updated in real-time
results_cryptographically_signed_by_nehs: All results are cryptographically signed and auditable by NEHS protocol
audit_ledger_desc: Immutable, cryptographically-signed chain of all system events
